commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a generated `docs/docs_map.md`, a generator/check script pair, and wires the docs-map freshness check into `check:docs`.

PR surface: Docs +9613, Config +2, Other +223. Total +9838 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: current PR-head source shows the generated map lacks docs-list metadata and the checker rewrites the tracked artifact before restoring it. The broader docs-map request is a feature, not a runtime bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair is clear for the PR branch: add docs metadata to the generated artifact and make the check mode non-mutating.

target.title: feat(docs): add docs_map.md for LLM navigation (fixes #69442)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

OpenClaw has 670+ doc pages across automation/, channels/, cli/, concepts/, gateway/, install/, nodes/, plugins/, providers/, tools/, web/, and more. LLM agents currently have to discover this tree through trial and error. A single `docs_map.md` fixes that by providing a structured outline of every page's headings.

This follows the pattern established by [code.claude.com/docs/en/claude_code_docs_map.md](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/claude_code_docs_map.md) — a docs map that lets an AI read one file and know exactly what concepts are inside each page.

## Changes

- Add `scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs` — walks `docs/`, extracts front-matter title and H2/H3/H4 headings, outputs structured `docs/docs_map.md`
- Add `pnpm docs:map` script to `package.json`
- Generate `docs/docs_map.md` covering 671 pages with 4672 headings

## How to Regenerate

```bash
pnpm docs:map
```

- [x] AI-assisted (Hermes Agent)

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** Adds a docs_map.md navigation file for LLM agents to discover doc pages by heading outline
- **Environment tested:** macOS, Node.js, OpenClaw repo at commit a824df2e
- **Steps run after the patch:** Ran `pnpm docs:map` to generate docs/docs_map.md; ran `pnpm build` to verify no build regression
- **Evidence after fix:**
```
$ node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const c=fs.readFileSync('docs/docs_map.md','utf8'); console.log('pages:', (c.match(/### /g)||[]).length); console.log('headings:', (c.match(/^- /gm)||[]).length); console.log('has_header:', c.startsWith('# Docs Map'));"
pages: 671
headings: 4672
has_header: true
$ grep -n 'generate-docs-map' package.json
1574:    "docs:map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
```
- **Observed result after fix:** docs/docs_map.md is generated with 671 pages and 4672 headings; `pnpm docs:map` script is registered in package.json; `pnpm build` passes
- **What was not tested:** CI workflow integration (auto-regeneration on docs/** push) — left as a follow-up since it requires GitHub Actions changes
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
